name: not_order_ev_pfirst_arr
drl: rule R when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-143 item 1b Family B: a mid-run blocker ARRIVAL opens a new not-unblock SEGMENT. P2 (before the arrival) and P3 (after) fall in different segments; segments fire NEWEST-first, so [3,2,1] (P3, then P2, then the initial P1). Isolates the segment boundary = event insert.
